generated_oml:
// C2: Physical Acting Components
instance OccupancyActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control actuator for occupancy-based lighting adjustments in BIM-enriched models, integrated with BOREALIS reinforcement learning policies for adaptive control"
]

instance LightingDimmerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical lighting dimmer actuator directly modeled in BIM for TwinLight project, receiving commands from DT for dynamic lighting control via Eclipse Hono"
]

instance HVACControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system controller actuator embedded in BIM models to receive and execute control commands from the Digital Twin for energy optimization"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancyDetector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy occupancy detector sensor integrated into BIM model to capture real-time occupancy data for BOREALIS reinforcement learning-based control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance AmbientLightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ambient light sensor integrated into BIM model measuring real-time light levels for adaptive lighting optimization in the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption meter sensor embedded in BIM to capture runtime operational energy data for building control system analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingZoneSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting zone sensor component within BIM model capturing spatial lighting conditions for TwinLight project control logic"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightZoneStatusDataTransmitted
]

instance HVACSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system sensor integrated into BIM model for real-time temperature and airflow monitoring in the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HVACStatusDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancyDetector
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientLightSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

instance LightZoneStatusDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingZoneSensor
]

instance HVACStatusDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HVACSensor
]

// C5: Data Models
instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Original BIM model enriched with control logic for sensors/actuators via BOREALIS framework, containing geometric, spatial, and functional attributes of building components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMRevitTool
]

instance RuntimeMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime metadata model extracted from BIM-enriched models containing sensor configurations, control logic, and device IDs for Ditto/Hono configuration generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MetadataExtractionTool
]

instance ControlPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model containing reinforcement learning-based control policies developed by BOREALIS for adaptive building control in the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RLPolicyEngine
]

// C6: Data Types
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data transmitted from post-occupancy sensors to the Digital Twin for occupancy-based control decisions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlAutomationService
]

instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ambient light level data captured by sensors for adaptive lighting optimization in the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption data from meters for building performance analysis and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PerformanceAnalysisService
]

instance LightZoneStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Spatial lighting status data from BIM-enriched models for TwinLight project control visualization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightZoneStatusDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance HVACStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time HVAC system status data for building control system monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HVACStatusDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ControlCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Control command data generated by Digital Twin for actuators, including lighting dimmer and HVAC system adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ActuatorMiddleware
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMEnrichmentTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tool used by building control engineers to model devices (sensors/actuators) with control logic in BIM models"
]

instance MetadataExtractionTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated framework that extracts metadata (sensor IDs) from BIM-enriched models to generate runtime artifacts for Ditto/Hono configurations"
]

instance RealTimeSyncMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware framework (Eclipse Ditto) enabling bidirectional data flow between physical building assets and their Digital Twin"
]

instance RLPolicyEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework (BOREALIS) integrating post-occupancy data to evolve Digital Twin control policies dynamically"
]

instance UnrealEngine5Visualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization platform (Unreal Engine 5) for real-time monitoring of building states in Digital Twin environments"
]

instance EclipseHonoIoT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time IoT connectivity framework (Eclipse Hono) for bidirectional communication between physical sensors/actuators and Digital Twin"
]

instance BIMRevitTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tool (Revit) used for device modeling and control logic definition within building information models"
]

// C12: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service providing live visualization of building states through Unreal Engine 5 for immersive Digital Twin interaction"
    DTDFVocab:provides ImmersiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service utilizing BOREALIS reinforcement learning for energy optimization, including adaptive lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlAutomationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "BIM-centric control framework (TwinLight) enabling automated control of building systems via Digital Twin commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemControlAction
]

instance PerformanceAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performance analysis service for clash detection, BIM-to-DT synchronization validation, and building operational monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalValidationInsight
]

instance CustomExtensibilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing extensibility via DT Engineers' plugins for advanced analytics and IoT integrations"
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ImmersiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time immersive visualization of building states through Unreal Engine 5 for facility managers and operators"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics insights for energy optimization including adaptive lighting schedules and HVAC system adjustments"
]

instance SystemControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control actions executed by Digital Twin for lighting dimmer adjustments and HVAC system modulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationalValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance validation insights including clash detection, BIM-to-DT synchronization quality, and operational compliance metrics"
]

instance PluginIntegrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Custom extensibility actions enabling third-party plugin integration for advanced analytics and IoT device connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C18: Environment
instance BuildingControlEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancyActuator, LightingDimmerActuator, HVACControllerActuator,
             OccupancyDetector, AmbientLightSensor, EnergyMeter,
             LightingZoneSensor, HVACSensor,
             BIMEnrichedModel, RuntimeMetadataModel, ControlPolicyModel,
             OccupancyData, LightLevelData, EnergyData,
             LightZoneStatusData, HVACStatusData, ControlCommandData,
             RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService,
             ControlAutomationService, PerformanceAnalysisService,
             CustomExtensibilityService,
             ImmersiveVisualizationInsight, EnergyOptimizationInsight,
             SystemControlAction, OperationalValidationInsight,
             PluginIntegrationAction,
             BIMEnrichmentTool, MetadataExtractionTool, RealTimeSyncMiddleware,
             RLPolicyEngine, UnrealEngine5Visualization, EclipseHonoIoT,
             BIMRevitTool
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Facilitates **control signal transmission** from the DT to physical building systems through middleware (e.g., **Eclipse Hono**), enabling automated adjustments to lighting, HVAC, or other BCS components. The DT generates control logic derived from BIM-enriched models and runtime analytics (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS) to optimize energy efficiency and occupant comfort. This interaction is standardized via **service-oriented architecture** with extension points for modular integration."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Operates on a **real-time to near-real-time** scale, with synchronization rates determined by sensor data acquisition frequencies. For lighting control (e.g., TwinLight), adjustments occur in **millisecond-to-second intervals** during runtime, while BOREALIS’ reinforcement learning iterates over **hours-to-days** to refine control policies based on post-occupancy data. The framework ensures **low-latency bidirectional communication** via optimized middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for critical control loops."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrates a **service-oriented DT ecosystem** where BIM models serve as the central hub. Components include:
  - **Physical assets** (sensors/actuators) linked to BIM via middleware,
  - **Runtime interfaces** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for bidirectional communication,
  - **Visualization layer** (Unreal Engine) for immersive monitoring,
  - **Custom services** (DT Engineers’ plugins) for extensibility.
  The constellation ensures **interoperability** via standardized APIs and modular extension points, enabling scalability from single devices to entire infrastructure systems."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the **entire building lifecycle**: **Design** (BIM modeling with control logic), **Construction** (device integration), **Operation** (real-time monitoring via DT), and **Refurbishment** (dynamic updates via reinforcement learning in BOREALIS). The DT operates as a **dynamic representation** of the physical building, evolving from a static BIM model to an operational control system with runtime adaptations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Ensures **high fidelity** via:
  - **ODTE metric** (Overall Digital Twin Entanglement) to measure interoperability and architectural soundness between physical and virtual models,
  - **Model-driven validation** of BIM-to-DT transformations,
  - **Uncertainty handling** through real-time sensor data integration (e.g., BOREALIS’ adaptive control policies).
  The framework addresses **verification/validation** by automating metadata extraction and runtime synchronization, reducing manual effort while maintaining alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Establishes **low-latency, bidirectional connections** via:
  - **Eclipse Hono** for IoT device communication (e.g., MQTT protocol),
  - **Eclipse Ditto** for service-oriented data exchange,
  - **Unreal Engine 5** for client-side visualization.
  The technical connection relies on **standardized APIs** and **middleware protocols** to ensure seamless integration with BIM tools and IoT sensors."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed as a **modular, service-oriented platform** with standardized extension points. The DT is hosted on **cloud-based or edge computing infrastructures** (not specified in documents) to support real-time processing. The framework leverages **Unreal Engine 5** for interactive visualization and **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for runtime data exchange, ensuring scalability across distributed systems."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Enables **interoperability with external systems** via:
  - **Standardized APIs** (e.g., Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for integration with IoT platforms,
  - **BIM compatibility** for collaboration with design/construction tools,
  - **Modular extension points** for custom services (e.g., DT Engineers’ plugins).
  The framework supports **data exchange** with other DTs or enterprise systems (e.g., ERP, BMS) through middleware protocols."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed in the documents, but implied to follow **AECO industry standards** for data governance. The framework likely assigns **data ownership** to the **building owner/operator**, with **privacy considerations** addressed via:
  - **Encrypted data transmission** (e.g., TLS for Hono/Ditto),
  - **Access controls** for DT Engineers/Facility Managers,
  - **Compliance with BIM standards** (e.g., IFC for interoperability)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adheres to **AECO-specific standards** including:
  - **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the semantic backbone,
  - **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** for interoperability,
  - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for IoT connectivity,
  - **Unreal Engine 5** for visualization,
  - **Model-driven engineering (MDE)** methodologies for automation.
  The framework’s **standardized extension points** ensure modularity and scalability across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Implements **cybersecurity measures** for remote DT operations:
  - **Authentication/authorization** for DT Engineers/Facility Managers,
  - **Encrypted data transmission** (e.g., TLS for Hono/Ditto),
  - **Real-time monitoring** to detect anomalies (e.g., unauthorized access),
  - **Safety protocols** for critical control systems (e.g., HVAC/lighting actuators) to prevent accidents.
  The framework ensures **safe remote execution** by validating all interactions via middleware and BIM-enriched models."
]
